Label.class: text-2xl font-black text-zinc-950 dark:text-white uppercase tracking-widest
text-xs text-zinc-600 dark:text-zinc-400 font-bold bg-zinc-50 dark:bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-200/50 dark:border-zinc-800/20 rounded-full px-4 py-1 self-center mt-2

StackLayout.class: bg-zinc-50/90 dark:bg-zinc-900/60 border border-zinc-200/50 dark:border-zinc-800/30 rounded-3xl p-6 shadow-2xl

Label.class: fas text-3xl text-zinc-900 dark:text-white text-center mb-2
text-lg text-center font-bold text-zinc-700 dark:text-zinc-300 mb-6
text-center text-2xl font-black text-zinc-900 dark:text-white bg-white dark:bg-zinc-950/80 border border-zinc-200 dark:border-zinc-700/40 rounded-2xl py-4

Button.class: bg-zinc-100 dark:bg-zinc-900 text-zinc-800 dark:text-zinc-200 border border-zinc-200 dark:border-zinc-800 active:bg-zinc-200 dark:active:bg-zinc-850 font-extrabold text-lg rounded-2xl py-4
bg-zinc-950 dark:bg-white text-white dark:text-zinc-950 active:bg-zinc-900 dark:active:bg-zinc-100 font-extrabold text-lg rounded-2xl py-4
